mapper.update:
update t_oil_card set deleted_flag = #{deletedFlag} where oil_card_id in
#{item}
mapper.select: SELECT oc.*, oe.enterprise_name, receiveUser.actual_name receiveUserName, receiveUser.phone receiveUserPhone, v.vehicle_number useVehicleNumber, d.driver_name useDriverName, d.telephone useDriverPhone FROM t_oil_card oc LEFT JOIN t_oa_enterprise oe ON oe.enterprise_id = oc.enterprise_id LEFT JOIN t_employee receiveUser ON receiveUser.employee_id = oc.receive_user_id LEFT JOIN t_vehicle v ON v.vehicle_id = oc.use_vehicle_id LEFT JOIN t_driver d ON d.driver_id = oc.use_driver_id WHERE oil_card_id = #{oilCardId}
mapper.update: UPDATE t_oil_card set disabled_flag = #{disabledFlag} where master_oil_card_id = #{masterOilCardId} AND deleted_flag = #{deletedFlag}
UPDATE t_oil_card set pre_distribution_balance = pre_distribution_balance + #{changeAmount} where oil_card_id = #{oilCardId}
mapper.select: SELECT * from t_oil_card where master_oil_card_id = #{masterOilCardId} AND deleted_flag = #{deletedFlag}
